Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension

Interface ExtensibleComparableValidator<S,​T extends Comparable<? super T>>

Type Parameters:
S - the type of validator returned by the methods
T - the type of the value being validated
All Superinterfaces:
ExtensibleObjectValidator<S,​T>
All Known Subinterfaces:
BigDecimalPrecisionValidator, BigDecimalValidator, ComparableValidator<T>, ExtensibleFloatingPointValidator<S,​T>, ExtensibleIntegerValidator<S,​T>, ExtensibleNumberValidator<S,​T>, FloatingPointValidator<T>, IntegerValidator<T>, NumberValidator<T>, PrimitiveCharacterValidator, PrimitiveFloatingPointValidator<T>, PrimitiveIntegerValidator<T>, PrimitiveNumberValidator<T>, SizeValidator
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractComparableValidator, AbstractComparableValidatorNoOp, AbstractDoubleValidator, AbstractFloatingPointValidatorNoOp, AbstractFloatValidator, AbstractIntegerValidator, AbstractNumberValidator, AbstractNumberValidatorNoOp, AbstractPrimitiveNumberValidatorNoOp, BigDecimalPrecisionValidatorImpl, BigDecimalPrecisionValidatorNoOp, BigDecimalScaleValidatorImpl, BigDecimalValidatorImpl, BigDecimalValidatorNoOp, BooleanValidatorNoOp, ComparableValidatorImpl, ComparableValidatorNoOp, DoubleValidatorImpl, FloatingPointValidatorNoOp, FloatValidatorImpl, IntegerValidatorImpl, IntegerValidatorNoOp, LongValidatorImpl, NumberValidatorImpl, NumberValidatorNoOp, PrimitiveBooleanValidatorNoOp, PrimitiveCharacterValidatorImpl, PrimitiveCharacterValidatorNoOp, PrimitiveDoubleValidatorImpl, PrimitiveFloatingPointValidatorNoOp, PrimitiveFloatValidatorImpl, PrimitiveIntegerValidatorImpl, PrimitiveIntegerValidatorNoOp, PrimitiveNumberValidatorImpl, PrimitiveNumberValidatorNoOp, SizeValidatorImpl, SizeValidatorNoOp
public interface ExtensibleComparableValidator<S,​T extends Comparable<? super T>>
extends ExtensibleObjectValidator<S,​T>
Validates the requirements of a value that extends Comparable but the implementing validator is not guaranteed to be a ComparableValidator.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type Method Description
    S isBetween​(T startInclusive, T endExclusive)
    Ensures that the actual value is within range.
    S isBetweenClosed​(T startInclusive, T endInclusive)
    Ensures that the actual value is within range.
    S isComparableTo​(T expected)
    Ensures that the actual value is comparable to the expected value.
    S isComparableTo​(T expected, String name)
    Ensures that the actual value is comparable to the expected value.
    S isGreaterThan​(T value)
    Ensures that the actual value is greater than the specified value.
    S isGreaterThan​(T value, String name)
    Ensures that the actual value is greater than the specified the specified value.
    S isGreaterThanOrEqualTo​(T value)
    Ensures that the actual value is greater than or equal to the specified value.
    S isGreaterThanOrEqualTo​(T value, String name)
    Ensures that the actual value is greater than or equal to the specified value.
    S isLessThan​(T value)
    Ensures that the actual value is less than the specified value.
    S isLessThan​(T value, String name)
    Ensures that the actual value is less than the value of the specified value.
    S isLessThanOrEqualTo​(T value)
    Ensures that the actual value is less than or equal to the specified value.
    S isLessThanOrEqualTo​(T value, String name)
    Ensures that the actual value is less than or equal to the specified value.
    S isNotComparableTo​(T other)
    Ensures that the actual value is not comparable to another value.
    S isNotComparableTo​(T other, String name)
    Ensures that the actual value is not comparable to another value.

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleObjectValidator

    asString, asString, getActual, getFailures, isActualAvailable, isEqualTo, isEqualTo, isInstanceOf, isNotEqualTo, isNotEqualTo, isNotInstanceOf, isNotNull, isNotOneOf, isNotSameObjectAs, isNull, isOneOf, isSameObjectAs

  • Method Details

    • isGreaterThan

      S isGreaterThan​(T value)
      Ensures that the actual value is greater than the specified value.
      Parameters:
      value - a lower bound
      Returns:
      the updated validator
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if value is null

    • isGreaterThan

      S isGreaterThan​(T value, String name)
      Ensures that the actual value is greater than the specified the specified value.
      Parameters:
      value - a lower bound
      name - the name of the lower bound
      Returns:
      the updated validator
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if name or value are null
      IllegalArgumentException - if name is empty

    • isGreaterThanOrEqualTo

      S isGreaterThanOrEqualTo​(T value)
      Ensures that the actual value is greater than or equal to the specified value.
      Parameters:
      value - the minimum value
      Returns:
      the updated validator
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if value is null

    • isGreaterThanOrEqualTo

      S isGreaterThanOrEqualTo​(T value, String name)
      Ensures that the actual value is greater than or equal to the specified value.
      Parameters:
      value - the minimum value
      name - the name of the minimum value
      Returns:
      the updated validator
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if name or value are null
      IllegalArgumentException - if name is empty

    • isLessThan

      S isLessThan​(T value)
      Ensures that the actual value is less than the specified value.
      Parameters:
      value - the upper bound
      Returns:
      the updated validator
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if value is null

    • isLessThan

      S isLessThan​(T value, String name)
      Ensures that the actual value is less than the value of the specified value.
      Parameters:
      value - the upper bound
      name - the name of the upper bound
      Returns:
      the updated validator
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if value or name are null
      IllegalArgumentException - if name is empty

    • isLessThanOrEqualTo

      S isLessThanOrEqualTo​(T value)
      Ensures that the actual value is less than or equal to the specified value.
      Parameters:
      value - the maximum value
      Returns:
      the updated validator
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if value is null

    • isLessThanOrEqualTo

      S isLessThanOrEqualTo​(T value, String name)
      Ensures that the actual value is less than or equal to the specified value.
      Parameters:
      value - the maximum value
      name - the name of the maximum value
      Returns:
      the updated validator
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if value or name are null
      IllegalArgumentException - if name is empty

    • isComparableTo

      S isComparableTo​(T expected)
      Ensures that the actual value is comparable to the expected value.
      Parameters:
      expected - the expected value
      Returns:
      the updated validator
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if value is null

    • isComparableTo

      S isComparableTo​(T expected, String name)
      Ensures that the actual value is comparable to the expected value.
      Parameters:
      expected - the expected value
      name - the name of the expected value
      Returns:
      the updated validator
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if expected or name are null
      IllegalArgumentException - if name is empty

    • isNotComparableTo

      S isNotComparableTo​(T other)
      Ensures that the actual value is not comparable to another value.
      Parameters:
      other - the other value
      Returns:
      the updated validator
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if value is null

    • isNotComparableTo

      S isNotComparableTo​(T other, String name)
      Ensures that the actual value is not comparable to another value.
      Parameters:
      other - the other value
      name - the name of the other value
      Returns:
      the updated validator
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if other or name are null
      IllegalArgumentException - if name is empty

    • isBetween

      S isBetween​(T startInclusive, T endExclusive)
      Ensures that the actual value is within range.
      Parameters:
      startInclusive - the lower bound of the range (inclusive)
      endExclusive - the upper bound of the range (exclusive)
      Returns:
      the updated validator
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if startInclusive or endExclusive are null

    • isBetweenClosed

      S isBetweenClosed​(T startInclusive, T endInclusive)
      Ensures that the actual value is within range.
      Parameters:
      startInclusive - the lower bound of the range (inclusive)
      endInclusive - the upper bound of the range (inclusive)
      Returns:
      the updated validator
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if startInclusive or endInclusive are null
